name: Five Tomato Salad with Gorgonzola and Chive Toasts
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, at room temperature
Coarse salt and ground black pepper
2 large ripe yellow tomatoes, cut 1/4 inch thick
2 large ripe red tomatoes, cut 1/4 inch thick
2 large ripe orange tomatoes, cut 1/4 inch thick
3 medium zebra-striped tomatoes, cut 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cheese mixture: In a bowl, add the pine nuts, butter and Gorgonzola and mash together with a fork.
2. Prepare the vinaigrette: In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil and vinegar. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Alternate the different colors of tomato slices on a serving plate, overlapping them slightly. Scatter the cherry tomatoes over the top. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Drizzle the vinaigrette over the tomatoes.
4. Spread the cheese mixture on the toasted bread. Place the bread on a baking sheet and bake until golden brown around the edges, 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Cut the bread on the diagonal into 3-inch-wide pieces. Place the Gorgonzola toasts around the tomatoes. Sprinkle the salad and the toasts with the chives and serve immediately.
